name: Acknowledgement of Receipt
html:
Thank you for your message. This is to confirm that we have received your email and it is being reviewed.

We will get back to you within [X business days]. If you have any urgent questions in the meantime, please don't hesitate to reach out.
text:
Thank you for your message. This is to confirm that we have received your email and it is being reviewed.

We will get back to you within [X business days]. If you have any urgent questions in the meantime, please don't hesitate to reach out.
